info.title: Dermatologist Pro self-hosted API
info.description: Stage 5N production patient portal read contracts. The backend is self-hosted, PostgreSQL-owned, and has no managed runtime/database dependency.

get.summary: Read the linked patient portal overview
get.description: Returns the authenticated patient user's own safe portal overview: profile, next appointment, patient-safe reports, and reminders.

403.description: Only patient role may read this endpoint

get.description: Returns only patient_safe_text for a report linked to the authenticated patient account. Physician-only report fields are not exposed.

404.description: Report not found in linked patient scope
